title: MoreFruits
description: Adds more Fruits and Berries to Minecraft
body:
Development is paused until 1.21.2 is released (And until I have more time).

A Fabric mod that adds more Fruits and Berries to the game. Suggestions can be done in my discord or at the github. Have fun <3

Fruits: 
- Banana

Berries:
- Blueberry
- Blackberry
- Cherry

Juices:
- Sweet Berry Juice
- Blueberry Juice
